change_request: Fix nav active-state delay by replacing IntersectionObserver with a scroll event listener; replace Features section with a How It Works 3-step section to reduce page repetition
acceptance_criteria: site-header.tsx uses scroll listener not IntersectionObserver for immediate active state response
how-it-works-section.tsx created with 3 orange-numbered steps and connector line
page.tsx uses HowItWorksSection instead of FeaturesSection
howItWorks translation keys added for EN and ES with eyebrow title subtitle steps and cta

llm_analysis.assessment: The changes align with the change request by replacing IntersectionObserver with a scroll event listener and introducing a new How It Works section.

risks: components/site-header.tsx:SiteHeader - Potential performance issues with scroll event listener
components/how-it-works-section.tsx:HowItWorksSection - Potential layout issues with new section
lib/translations.ts:translations - Risk of missing translations for new keys

llm_analysis.notes: The changes do not introduce new input handling scenarios that require edge case consideration.
No API or contract changes detected; changes are internal to component behavior.

llm_analysis.recommendation: It is recommended to add tests for the new How It Works section and ensure the scroll listener behaves as expected.
